title: diasperus minutulus
side_effects: Diasperus minutulus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and respiratory issues. Ingesting the plant's extract can cause stomach problems, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, potentially leading to dehydration if left untreated. Prolonged use of the plant's extract can also lead to interactions with other medications, resulting in adverse effects such as dizziness, headaches, and changes in blood pressure. In severe cases, improper use of diasperus minutulus can cause more serious health issues, including liver and kidney damage.
